title: Oily Hair Got You Down? 9 Herbal Creams for Teenagers

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia creams, also known as tea tree oil creams, contain properties like terpinen-4-ol and cineole, which help reduce oiliness and purify the scalp. These constituents work by naturally controlling bacteria and fungal growth that can lead to oily hair. To use Melaleuca alternifolia creams for oily hair, gently massage a small amount into your scalp, focusing on the oily areas. Leave it on for about 30 minutes before shampooing as usual.  When you massage the cream into your scalp, the terpinen-4-ol helps to reduce the amount of sebum produced, while the cineole breaks down dirt and bacteria that can clog pores. This can help to normalize your scalp's natural oil production, reducing the greasiness of your hair.  After leaving the cream on for 30 minutes, shampoo your hair as you normally would. You may notice that your hair feels cleaner and less oily than before. Regular use of Melaleuca alternifolia creams can help to keep your scalp healthy and balanced, reducing oiliness and promoting a healthy scalp.
remedies.image_alt: Melaleuca alternifolia herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Rosmarinus officinalis creams have been found to help with oily hair due to its active properties and constituents, including rosmarinic acid and camphor. These compounds help to reduce sebum production, which is the main cause of oily hair. When applied to the scalp, rosmarinic acid helps to balance the pH levels, preventing the growth of bacteria that can contribute to oiliness. Camphor, on the other hand, has a cooling effect that helps to reduce inflammation and close the pores, thereby reducing the amount of oil released. If you're struggling with oily hair, consider using Rosmarinus officinalis creams in the following way: apply a small amount to your scalp and massage it in thoroughly, focusing on the oily areas. Leave it on for at least 30 minutes before washing your hair with a gentle shampoo. Repeat this process once or twice a week to see noticeable results. Using Rosmarinus officinalis creams on oily hair can lead to several outcomes, including reduced oiliness, a decrease in dandruff and itchiness, and improved scalp health. As the scalp's pH levels balance out and bacteria growth decreases, you may notice that your hair looks cleaner for longer and feels lighter and less greasy. Additionally, the reduction in inflammation can help to prevent irritation and discomfort associated with oily hair.
remedies.image_alt: Rosmarinus officinalis herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Lavandula angustifolia creams can be a helpful addition to your hair care routine if you have oily hair. The cream contains properties such as linalool and linalyl acetate, which are known for their astringent and antiseptic properties. These constituents can help reduce the oiliness of the scalp and hair by balancing the production of sebum. This is because the astringent properties can help tighten the pores on the scalp, thereby reducing the amount of oil that is released. To use Lavandula angustifolia creams for oily hair, try applying a small amount to your scalp and massaging it in before shampooing. Leave the cream on for 15-30 minutes before rinsing your hair as usual. You can also mix a few drops of the cream with your regular shampoo for an extra dose of oil-reducing power. Using Lavandula angustifolia creams regularly may help reduce the oiliness of your hair, leaving it looking cleaner and fresher for longer. Your scalp may also feel soothed and calmer, which can help reduce irritation and itchiness. Additionally, the antiseptic properties of the cream may help prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms that can contribute to oily hair.
remedies.image_alt: Lavandula angustifolia herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis creams are a natural solution for oily hair. The gel from the Aloe vera plant contains properties like vitamin E, vitamin C, and beta-carotene that help to balance the scalp's pH, reducing oil production. It also contains salicylic acid, which gently exfoliates the scalp, removing dead skin cells and other impurities that clog pores and contribute to oiliness. Additionally, Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and redness. To use Aloe barbadensis cream for oily hair, apply it directly to the scalp after shampooing, leaving it on for 15-30 minutes before rinsing. You can also mix a small amount with your regular shampoo for an extra boost. When you apply the cream, you may feel a slight cooling sensation as it absorbs excess oil and helps to regulate your scalp's natural moisture balance. As you continue to use the cream, you may notice that your hair looks cleaner for longer, with reduced oiliness and a more balanced texture. After a few weeks, you may also see a decrease in hair loss and an improvement in scalp health.
remedies.image_alt: Aloe barbadensis herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Saponaria officinalis creams are a natural solution for oily hair. The cream contains the plant's sapindus saponins, which are powerful astringents that help to balance oil production in the scalp. The saponins also have antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help to control the growth of microorganisms that contribute to oiliness. Additionally, the cream contains glycosides, which help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and flaking. To use Saponaria officinalis creams for oily hair, apply a small amount to the scalp and massage it in thoroughly. Leave the cream on for at least 30 minutes before washing it out with a gentle shampoo. You can use this cream 1-2 times a week, depending on how oily your hair is.  When using Saponaria officinalis creams, you can expect to see a reduction in oil production, making your hair look cleaner and healthier for longer. Your scalp may also become less irritated and flaky, and you may notice a decrease in dandruff. The cream's astringent properties can also help to tighten pores on the scalp, reducing the appearance of pores and giving your hair a smoother finish.
remedies.image_alt: Saponaria officinalis herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus creams can help with oily hair because it contains properties like camphor and eucalyptol, which are known to reduce oil production in the scalp. These constituents have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help control the growth of bacteria that can contribute to oily hair. Additionally, eucalyptus globulus has a cooling effect, which can help reduce the heat and irritation that can lead to excessive oil production. To use eucalyptus globulus creams for oily hair, apply a small amount to your scalp and massage it in gently. Then, leave it on for about 30 minutes to an hour before washing your hair with a gentle shampoo. You can also add a few drops of eucalyptus globulus oil to your shampoo or conditioner for extra benefits. When washing your hair, focus on the scalp rather than the ends, and use a gentle massaging motion to help remove the excess oil. By using eucalyptus globulus creams and following these steps, you can likely see a reduction in oil production and an improvement in the overall health of your scalp. Your hair may start to feel cleaner and lighter, and you may notice a decrease in the amount of oil that accumulates on your hair and scalp. However, it's essential to note that everyone's hair and scalp are different, and what works for one person may not work for another. Be patient and give it time to see the results.
remedies.image_alt: Eucalyptus globulus herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Lavandula stoechas creams may help with oily hair due to its properties and constituents. It contains lavender oil, which has antiseptic and antifungal properties that can help control oil production and reduce the appearance of oily hair. The creams also typically contain other ingredients like beeswax and coconut oil that help lock in moisture and protect the hair from environmental damage. These properties can help regulate the scalp's natural oil balance, reducing excessive oil production and leaving the hair looking cleaner and healthier. To use Lavandula stoechas creams for oily hair, apply a small amount to the roots of your hair, massaging it gently into your scalp. Leave the cream on for 15-30 minutes before shampooing as usual. You can also use it as a pre-shampoo treatment once or twice a week to help control oil production. When using the cream, be sure to focus on the scalp area, as this is where the oil production occurs. Avoid applying the cream to the ends of your hair, as this can weigh them down and make them look greasier. Using Lavandula stoechas creams for oily hair may lead to a noticeable reduction in oil production, leaving your hair looking cleaner and healthier. Your scalp may also feel soothed and calmed, reducing irritation and itchiness. Additionally, the antifungal properties of the lavender oil can help prevent scalp infections, promoting a healthy scalp environment. Regular use may also lead to a decrease in dandruff and other scalp conditions.
remedies.image_alt: Lavandula stoechas herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Thymus vulgaris creams can be very helpful in managing oily hair. These creams contain thymol, a compound that has antiseptic and antifungal properties. Thymol helps to control oil production by inhibiting the growth of bacteria on the scalp, which can contribute to oily hair. It also has a drying effect, which can help to balance the scalp's natural oil production. Thymus vulgaris creams typically contain other constituents like essential oils, such as rosemary or lavender, which have astringent and balancing properties. If you're looking to use Thymus vulgaris creams for oily hair, here's what you can do. First, choose a cream that contains a high concentration of thymol. Look for products that are specifically designed for oily hair and scalp. Apply the cream to your scalp after shampooing, focusing on the areas with the most oil buildup. Massage it in gently to help the thymol penetrate the scalp. Leave the cream on for a few minutes before rinsing it out with warm water. Be sure to follow the instructions on the label and start with a small amount to see how your scalp reacts. Using Thymus vulgaris creams for oily hair can lead to a reduction in oil production and a balanced scalp. You may notice that your hair looks cleaner and healthier, with less oiliness and greasiness. Regular use of these creams can also help to prevent dandruff and other scalp issues associated with oily hair. However, keep in mind that everyone's scalp is different, and it may take some time to see the full effects of Thymus vulgaris creams. Be patient and consistent in your application, and you may be able to achieve the desired results.
remedies.image_alt: Thymus vulgaris herbal creams for oily hair

remedies.remedy_desc: Thymus serpyllum creams, also known as thyme creams, can help with oily hair due to its natural antiseptic and astringent properties. The creams contain constituents like thymol, a compound that helps to balance the scalp's pH levels and reduce oil production. Thymol also has antimicrobial properties, which can help to eliminate bacteria and fungi that can contribute to oily hair. Additionally, thymus serpyllum creams contain flavonoids and saponins, which can help to tighten the hair follicles and reduce oil flow.  To use thymus serpyllum creams for oily hair, apply a small amount to the scalp and massage it in gently. Leave the cream on for at least an hour before washing your hair as usual. You can use it 1-2 times a week, depending on the severity of your oily hair. Be sure to choose a cream that is free from harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances, as these can irritate the scalp and make the problem worse. When you use thymus serpyllum creams for oily hair, you can expect to see a reduction in oil production and an improvement in scalp health. Your hair may feel cleaner and look healthier, with a more balanced pH level. You may also notice that you need to wash your hair less frequently, as the oil production has decreased. However, keep in mind that thymus serpyllum creams may not completely eliminate oily hair, but they can help to manage and reduce it.
remedies.image_alt: Thymus serpyllum herbal creams for oily hair

intro_desc: Teenagers often struggle with oily hair, and it's not just about looking greasy. When you have oily hair, it's hard to style your hair the way you want, and it can make you feel self-conscious. Oily hair can be especially frustrating when you're trying to fit in or make a good impression. It can also be difficult to keep clean, and it may lead to scalp irritation and acne. This can affect not just your appearance, but also your confidence and mood. As a result, you might find yourself spending a lot of time washing and styling your hair, which can be tiring and time-consuming.  So, why do teenagers get oily hair? It's often due to hormonal changes during puberty, which can cause your scalp to produce more oil. This can also be influenced by genetics, and some people may naturally have oilier hair than others.  To treat oily hair, some people turn to herbal creams. These creams are made from natural ingredients that can help balance your scalp's oil production. They work by reducing the amount of oil your scalp produces, which can help keep your hair looking cleaner and healthier for longer. They can also help soothe an itchy scalp and reduce inflammation. These creams are often gentle and non-irritating, making them a great option for teenagers who are looking for a natural solution to oily hair.
